name: Real Caesar Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wooden bowl with a wooden spoon, rub the drained anchovies into the sides of the bowl until pasty.
2. Add the garlic and rub it into the anchovies.
3. Add the Tabasco sauce, lemon juice, and mustard to the bowl. Blend well into the anchovies.
4. Gradually add the olive oil while continuing to blend until smooth.
5. Add the Parmesan cheese and mix well.
6. Tear 1 head of Romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
7. Toss the lettuce with the dressing.
8. Add croutons and toss again.
9. Serve immediately.
